mechanism_narrative: A lower FEDFUNDS rate transmits through discount rates and financing costs, lifting equity valuations and supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next month when policy is already near the effective lower bound.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day SPX returns are not positive more often than negative when FEDFUNDS is falling, or if the signal's walk-forward Rank IC stays below 0.03 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE signals weakening household income and demand, which should precede negative S&P 500 returns as investors price lower earnings growth within one month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes produce positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the conditional mean return is not below the unconditional mean at the 5% level.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS accelerates while HOUST remains weak, consumption demand is improving faster than housing supply, a combination that should support positive equity returns over the next quarter through stronger revenue expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition on RSAFS and HOUST does not outperform either proxy alone in out-of-sample classification, or if 60-day returns are not positive after the interaction signal in at least 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO confirms improving industrial output and capacity utilization, which should lift cyclical earnings expectations and generate positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO is above its 6-month moving average and rising month over month
failure_condition: Reject if the triggered signal fails to produce above-baseline 20-day SPX returns, or if the sign of the effect reverses in more than one third of rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A large spread between low FEDFUNDS and elevated CPIAUCSL implies negative real rates, which should support risk assets by lowering the real hurdle rate and increasing equity duration exposure over the next month.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS minus recent inflation proxy is strongly negative
failure_condition: Reject if periods with a strongly negative policy-inflation spread do not outperform the unconditional mean return, or if the interaction term adds no predictive value beyond FEDFUNDS alone.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in PAYEMS and rise in UNRATE indicates deteriorating labor demand, which should lead to negative S&P 500 returns over the next week as traders reprice earnings and default risk quickly.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined labor deterioration signal does not predict negative 5-day returns better than either series individually, or if hit rate falls below 50% in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in GDPC1 following prior contraction marks renewed aggregate demand, and equities should respond positively over the next quarter as earnings estimates improve with real activity.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 turns positive after a prior quarterly decline
failure_condition: Reject if GDP reacceleration episodes fail to deliver positive 60-day SPX returns on average, or if the signal's conditional Sharpe ratio is not above zero in any 4-quarter block.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and HOUST both strengthen together, consumers are spending while housing demand is firm, a broad demand impulse that should lift S&P 500 returns over the next month; the signal fails if either series improves alone without the other.
candidate_trigger: both series rise above their 3-month averages
failure_condition: Reject if the pairwise strengthening condition does not outperform single-variable rules, or if triggered 20-day returns are not positive in at least 55% of cases.
